revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} Alternately, use: *{{tl|ROC}} for {{ROC}} *{{tl|ROC-TW}} for {{ROC-TW}} *{{tl|TPE}} for {{TPE}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[als:Vorlage:TWN]] [[ar:قالب:تايوان]] [[bn:টেমপ্লেট:TWN]] [[de:Vorlage:TWN]] [[el:Πρότυπο:TWN]] [[es:Plantilla:TWN]] [[eo:Ŝablono:TWN]] [[eu:Txantiloi:TWN]] [[fr:Modèle:Taïwan]] [[gl:Template:TWN]] [[ko:틀:TWN]] [[id:Templat:TWN]] [[is:Snið:TWN]] [[it:Template:TWN]] [[lb:Template:TWN]] [[ja:Template:TWN]] [[pt:Predefinição:TWN]] [[qu:Plantilla:TWN]] [[ru:Шаблон:TWN]] [[simple:Template:TWN]] [[sk:Šablóna:TWN]] [[sl:Predloga:TWN]] [[th:แม่แบบ:TWN]] [[tr:Şablon:TW]] [[uk:Шаблон:TWN]] [[ur:Template:TWN]] [[vi:Template:TWN]] [[zh-yue:Template:TWN]] [[zh:Template:TWN]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q5618189)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23362124453|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
